description_long: This object is a sub-style sandwich featuring a golden-brown, crusty bread roll with visible grill marks on the top. The sandwich is generously filled with layers of fresh green lettuce, slices of tomato, and what appears to be deli meats such as ham or turkey, along with melted cheese peeking out from the sides. The bread has a slightly glossy, baked finish and is split horizontally to hold the fillings. Some leafy greens and ingredients are spilling out from the sides, giving it a hearty, overstuffed appearance. The sandwich looks freshly made, with vibrant colors and a soft, semi-structured form. There is no visible packaging or branding, and the sandwich is presented in isolation against a plain background.
description: A hearty sub sandwich with a golden-brown crusty roll, filled with lettuce, tomato, deli meats, and cheese, with ingredients spilling out the sides. The sandwich looks fresh and overstuffed, with no visible packaging or branding.
description_view_0: This view highlights the top of the sandwich with pronounced grill marks and a glimpse of lettuce and meat spilling from the left side.
description_view_1: This angle shows the sandwich's side, revealing layers of lettuce, tomato, and melted cheese, with the bread's texture and grill marks visible.
description_view_2: This view focuses on the sandwich's filling, with clear visibility of tomato slices, lettuce, and the rounded top of the bread.
description_view_3: This perspective shows the sandwich from the opposite side, emphasizing the cross-section of the bread and the colorful interior ingredients.
